title: DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support services to individuals experiencing intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Services include case management, individual and family support plans, access to brokerage services, in-home support, residential placement, and abuse investigation and protective services. 5240 NE Elam Young Parkway Suite 150 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 846-3150 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-3150 Intake (503) 846-4737 Application and Eligibility Support Intake (503) 846-6272 Abuse and Neglect Reporting Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request an application. An appointment will be scheduled to help with the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Arabic, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Hawthorn Farm TriMet MAX stop Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Parenting Programs Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES
